summary: Tested ConciergePickCard personalization and MiraDemoPage back navigation features. Both features are implemented but personalization has a minor bug - soul trait mappings don't match actual pet data values.

ui_bugs.issue: traitToReason() function has value mismatches - separation_anxiety expects 'Yes/Sometimes/No' but pet data has 'Moderate'. Also uses field name 'stranger_comfort' but pet data has 'stranger_reaction'

action_items: Add 'Moderate' mapping to separation_anxiety in traitToReason() function
Add 'stranger_reaction' as an alias for 'stranger_comfort' OR update pillarTraitMap to use 'stranger_reaction'
Add 'Okay for Few Hours' mapping to alone_comfort
critical_code_review_comments: Feature 1 (ConciergePickCard personalization): PARTIALLY WORKING - Card shows on pillar pages with pet name but falls back to general_nature instead of specific soul traits
Feature 2 (Back to Pillar navigation): FULLY WORKING - Banner appears on MiraDemoPage with returnUrl/pillar params, clicking returns user to correct pillar page
Root Cause: traitToReason() mappings in petSoulInference.js don't match actual pet data values from doggy_soul_answers

success_rate.frontend: 85% (back navigation 100%, personalization 70% - works but uses fallback)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Mystique's actual soul data: separation_anxiety='Moderate', alone_comfort='Okay for Few Hours', stranger_reaction='Cautious at first', temperament='Protective', general_nature='Friendly'. The traitToReason() function in petSoulInference.js needs mappings updated to handle these actual values.

concierge_pick_card_stay_page.details: Card displays with 'Designed for Mystique who has a friendly nature' - falls back to general_nature instead of specific traits
concierge_pick_card_stay_page.expected: Should show soul traits like 'who needs extra comfort when away from home' (from separation_anxiety)

concierge_pick_card_celebrate_page.details: Card displays with same fallback message

back_to_pillar_banner.details: 'Back to Stay' banner appears when navigating to /mira-demo?pillar=stay&returnUrl=%2Fstay

back_to_pillar_click.details: Clicking 'Back to Stay' navigates user back to /stay correctly

separation_anxiety.Moderate: who can get anxious when left alone

stranger_reaction.Cautious at first: who warms up slowly to new people
